channel.title: Comments for page "Join the Flock"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Join the Flock"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Sergeant Michael talked softly to the D-class subject. She had just exited SCP-3662 and entered the body of another D-class, and he wanted to know what, exactly, went on in SCP-3662.

This intro feels weirdly worded. First sentence doesn't parse well, and the second sentence feels a bit too heavy on explanation even though the goal is to explain what Michael wants to do.

I like the structure of this tale. It really lends itself well to exploring the knock-on effects of various actions and their consequences, and revealing that this cute, silly concept is actually going to be pretty horrifying in the long-run. The humor is still intact as well, which I appreciate.

All that said, I don't think the writing carries it too well. There are a number of sections where the writing falls flat and doesn't convey the tone you want to go for. The first section, Hoygull's first section, and Browning's section suffer the most from this. You're so close to nailing it, and I liked it enough otherwise, that I'm a no-vote on this. I think this could be slightly rewritten after the contest to reach its potential.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
A-well, a bird, bird, bird, bird is a word

I couldn't resist

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I was expecting multiple kinds of things from the doomsday contest - aliens, biological super mutants, unstoppable cognitohazards. But not once did I expect a memetic bird mind-controlling disease. It's a creative and well-written tale and makes one wonder how the hell the Foundation is gonna get out of this debacle.

+1, great work.

item.title: BIRD POST
item.content:encoded:
Is this just an elaborate attempt to, in a way that won't get downvoted to hell, make your fursona into an SCP?

- /u/Aquixtry

Thanks to everybody who looked at this for crit. I can't remember everybody, but I do remember Dr Aers, FloppyPhoenix, and DrBenny. Please tell me if I forgot you.

This is for the doomsday contest, for TEAM BIRD BEST TEAM!!!!
